lines.lyrics: I heald the weight of yesterday, like shadow I couldn't chase away
Every smile was painted on trying to look strong when hope was gone
Tired of running in circles, tired of hiding the pain, it's time to stop pretending I'm not okay
Let it fade, let it go, all the hurt I used to know, I've been breaking just to mend, learning where the healing ends
Let it fade light the night, I walk forward toward the light, I'm not who I was before, I don't need to hurt anymore
I used to fear being alone, but silence help me find my own tone
I whispered truth into the dark, and found the pieces of my heart
Now I'm done with the replay, done with all the blame, ready to forgive myself and drop the shame.
Let it fade, let it go, all the hurt I used to know, I've been breaking just to mend, learning where the healing ends
Let it fade light the night, I walk forward toward the light, I'm not who I was before, I don't need to hurt anymore
It's not weakness when you cry, it's a step towards being free, every fear is just a sign of letting go of what used to be
Let it fade, let it go, watch me rise soft and slow, I'm still here still standing tall, learning how to love through it all
Let it fade light the night, making room for morning light, I'm not broken just reborn, and I don't need to hurt anymore
